## Standards checklist
- [ ] No `any`, no `@ts-ignore`
- [ ] All UI uses `components/ui/` or AntD directly per DESIGN.md
- [ ] Tokens from `theme/tokens.ts` — no hardcoded values
- [ ] Test file for every new source file
- [ ] Coverage ≥80% per file
- [ ] PR diff ≤ 300 lines
- [ ] No new dependencies (or justified below)
- [ ] `.context/` updated if primitives/contracts/conventions changed
- [ ] No `console.log`, `debugger`, `.skip`, `.only`
